constraints.statement: TGA packages MUST preserve TSMM as the semantic authority for active trust-system modeling.
TGA decision receipts MUST be treated as TSMM-profiled receipts with Trust Graph provenance extensions, not as a competing decision receipt model.
Machine-readable decision outcomes SHOULD use TSMM canonical terms. Local Trust Graph vocabulary MAY be retained when mapped in registries/outcome-vocabulary.yaml.
The assuranceLevel field in active TGA receipts represents TSMM profile posture. Executable assurance rigor MUST be represented by an explicit assurance profile such as TIS AL1-AL4 when required.
Essay provenance MUST NOT be treated as runtime evidence. Runtime evidence belongs in evidenceRefs or TIS-compatible evidence artifacts.
